title: DEADLY PREMONITION
notes: When the game finishes launching past the Developer credits and the intro movie starts the visuals of the movie have a Matrix-effect, when you hear the audio start Press Start or A to get to the main start menu. The audio effects and music in the game play well. Some in game graphics have a rainbow psychedelic coloration effect over them, it seems to occur when a transparent filter is applied over the in game characters and objects, such as looking through a window or when the in game lighting is in day time. The Game plays slower than the original speed but is still very playable.

title: Halo 3
notes: Crashes immediately on load.

reports.notes: Crashes immediately on load.
Dev test report
Test report
Dev test report pre release
One more for luck…
Another test
Shows Halo 3 copyright screen with logo and crashes immediately.

- XeniOS is inside of LiveContainer nightly with universal.js as its script and it boots up the App Store version of StikDebug (the App Store version launches JIT for other apps just fine)
- The PiP window almost never shows up
- Halo 3 usually opens into a black screen but sometimes the entire app just closes instantly
- I have all modern scripts in the scripts folder of the App Store version of StikDebug
Crashes upon launch ping the game.
Low FPS, but can start and play campaign, important note, if you die you can get stuck in a cutscene loop.
Can play in campaign, frequently drops in FPS but seems to sit around 11-19 range. As described by another user you will need to select mission to bypass the initial cutscene which loops.

Campaign cutscene cannot transition into gameplay in at least the first level. Workaround is to hit A to skip loop it once, back out, and start  the actual first mission from the campaign menu. 

Performance is about 15fps on iPhone 17.
Does not boot
Does not boot
Does not boot

title: Skate 3
notes: Runs pretty low fps and anytime I teleport to another location, the game crashes

reports.notes: Runs pretty low fps and anytime I teleport to another location, the game crashes
Black screen

The game boots and you can get into the main game as expected. However, actual gameplay is quite slow. Loading into the map for the first time is especially slow and you will likely encounter some graphical glitches as it loads in. Video content (e.g. pre-rendered cutscenes) also has heavy graphical glitches during playback.

Menu boots, heavy graphical artifacts/issues on loading screens or cutscenes. 
Upon loading into gameplay game speed is about 50%. Upon trying to load into a mission and/or teleport the game will crash.
The intro has some graphical issues and the game crashes after the intro
